# **Sprint Plan 1 \- CsLife** 

# Team Name: BitByte 

### Members: Marco Nasirpour, Nima Jamshidi, 

Adrian Lopez, Ethan Zarella,   
Saniha Sreedhara 

### Release 1.0, Release Date: 6/24/2026, 

### Revision: N/A, Revision Date: N/A 

**Goal:** The goal of sprint 1 is to create the game by letting the players choose a character, view their statistics before entering the game, progress through the quarters and save their progression.

**User Story 1 (High Priority):**

As a player, I want to start a new game in which I can choose my name and starting stats

| Task | Time Estimation (hours) |
| :---: | :---: |
| Design a character creation screen | 3 |
| Name creation system | 2 |
| Starting statistic system  | 5 |
|  | **Total Time Estimate: 10 hours** |

 **User Story 2 (High Priority):**  
 As a team, we want a Github Scrum board to organize sprint work, assign tasks, and track the progress of each task throughout the sprint.

| Task | Short Description | Time Estimation (hours) |
| :---: | :---: | :---: |
|  Setting up Github Scrum Board | Create a new github project, link it to the group Github repository, set up the Scrum board workflow (e.g. Backlog, To Do, In Progress, Review, Done), and add descriptions explaining what each task needs to accomplish) |  3 |
|  |  | **Total Time Estimate: 3 hours** |
